title: LendingTransactionMethodeTypeValues
description: Lending method applied to the securities financing contract.(ISO20022 BM)

x-enumeration-literals.name: On Demand Trade
x-enumeration-literals.description: Contract applies to a specific security only.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exclusive Trade
x-enumeration-literals.description: Contract applies to a number of different securities within the same pool/fund.(ISO20022)
